scenario.name: cisco_bulkupdate_refer_uac
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];rport;branch=[branch] From: <sip:1031@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:1031@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER User-Agent: Cisco-CP8865/12.1.1 Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:1031@127.0.0.1:__SIPP_CONTACT_PORT__;transport=tcp>;+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:00000000-0000-0000-0000-bbccddeeff31>" Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];rport;branch=[branch] From: <sip:1031@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:1031@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER User-Agent: Cisco-CP8865/12.1.1 Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:1031@127.0.0.1:__SIPP_CONTACT_PORT__;transport=tcp>;+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:00000000-0000-0000-0000-bbccddeeff31>" [authentication username=1031 password=ci-no-secret] Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0
